description.content: Operations for retrieving package details associated with an Appian application.

Retrieves data about any in-flight packages for the specified application. Returns up to 100 packages ordered by last modified timestamp with the most recently modified package first. This endpoint can be used to link packages to change management systems or to obtain package identifiers for use with the Deployment REST API.

variable.description: (Required) The UUID of the application whose packages are being retrieved. This UUID can be found in the application properties within Appian Designer.
The Appian site domain, typically in the format mysite.appiancloud.com for cloud deployments.

response.name: Successfully retrieved the list of packages for the specified application.

variable.description: (Required) The UUID of the application whose packages are being retrieved. This UUID can be found in the application properties within Appian Designer.
The Appian site domain, typically in the format mysite.appiancloud.com for cloud deployments.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

variable.description: (Required) The UUID of the application whose packages are being retrieved. This UUID can be found in the application properties within Appian Designer.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
The Appian site domain, typically in the format mysite.appiancloud.com for cloud deployments.

The Application Package Details API uses the UUID of an application to retrieve data about any in-flight packages for that application. It can be used to link packages to change management systems or obtain identifiers for packages that can then be used with the Deployment REST API to perform exports and deployments. Packages are returned in order of last modified timestamp, with the most recently modified package appearing first, up to a maximum of 100 packages.

Contact Support:
 Name: Appian Corporation
 Email: support@appian.com
